name: MEG-MASC — Naturalistic Speech MEG
description: A MEG dataset of 27 participants listening to ~2 hours of naturalistic narrated stories (the MASC corpus), with rich linguistic annotations. A high-temporal-resolution resource for modeling continuous speech comprehension.
citation: Gwilliams L, et al. (2023). MEG-MASC: a high-quality magneto-encephalography dataset for evaluating natural speech processing. Scientific Data, 10, 862.
